tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"enable
configure terminal
ip access-list extended CP_ICMP
 permit icmp any any
exit
class-map match-any CM_CP_ICMP
 match access-group name CP_ICMP
exit
policy-map PM_CP
 class CM_CP_ICMP
  police 8000 8000 conform-action transmit exceed-action drop
 class class-default
  pass
exit
control-plane
 service-policy input PM_CP
end
write memory
"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
enable
Switch#configure terminal
Enter configuration commands, one per line.  End with CNTL/Z.
Switch(config)#ip access-list extended CP_ICMP
Switch(config-ext-nacl)# permit icmp any any
Switch(config-ext-nacl)#exit
Switch(config)#class-map match-any CM_CP_ICMP
Switch(config-cmap)# match access-group name CP_ICMP
Switch(config-cmap)#exit
Switch(config)#policy-map PM_CP
Switch(config-pmap)# class CM_CP_ICMP
Switch(config-pmap-c)#  police 8000 8000 conform-action transmit exceed-actio$00 8000 conform-action transmit exceed-action          drop
Switch(config-pmap-c-police)# class class-default
Switch(config-pmap-c)#  pass
                         ^
% Invalid input detected at '^' marker.

Switch(config-pmap-c)#exit
Switch(config-pmap)#control-plane
Switch(config-cp)# service-policy input PM_CP
Switch(config-cp)#end
Switch#write memory
Building configuration...
Compressed configuration from 3569 bytes to 1681 bytes
*Mar 26 11:51:46.308: %SYS-5-CONFIG_I: Configured from console by console[OK]
Switch#
Switch#
Switch#
*Mar 26 11:51:48.660: %GRUB-5-CONFIG_WRITING: GRUB configuration is being updated on disk. Please wait...
*Mar 26 11:51:49.325: %GRUB-5-CONFIG_WRITTEN: GRUB configuration was written to disk successfully.

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"cisco-switch","command":"show running-config | section control-plane
show running-config | include policy-map
show running-config | include class-map
show running-config | include access-list CP_ICMP
"}

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.content:
show running-config | section control-plane
control-plane
 service-policy input PM_CP
Switch#show running-config | include policy-map
policy-map PM_CP
Switch#show running-config | include class-map
class-map match-any CM_CP_ICMP
Switch#show running-config | include access-list CP_ICMP
Switch#
Switch#
Switch#

tool_calls.name: send_command_to_device
tool_calls.arguments:
{"device_identifier":"FortiGate7.0.14-1","command":"config firewall address
edit "Compromised-192.168.1.3"
 set subnet 192.168.1.3 255.255.255.255
next
edit "WAN-ICMP-Targets"
 set subnet 0.0.0.0 0.0.0.0
next
end
config firewall service custom
edit "ICMP"
 set protocol 1
next
end
config firewall policy
edit 0
 set name "Deny-ICMP-Egress-From-Host"
 set srcintf "Port2"
 set dstintf "Port1"
 set srcaddr "Compromised-192.168.1.3"
 set dstaddr "WAN-ICMP-Targets"
 set action deny
 set service "ICMP"
 set schedule "always"
 set logtraffic all
 set status enable
next
end
write
"}
